scheme_name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship Scheme
administering_body: Department of School Education & Literacy, Ministry of Education
description_text: Scholarships to meritorious students of economically weaker sections to arrest their drop out at class VIII and encourage them to continue study at secondary stage

scheme_name: Central Sector Scheme of Top Class Education in Schools for OBC, EBC and DNT Students
administering_body: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
award_amount: up to ₹75,000/year for Class 9-10, up to ₹1,25,000/year for Class 11-12
description_text: The scheme provides premium education to meritorious OBC, EBC and DNT students in top class schools from Class 9 to Class 12. The sanction of scholarship is based on merit and done through an online portal. At least 30% of scholarships are reserved for girls.

scheme_name: AICTE-Pragati Scholarship Scheme for Girl Students (Degree)
description_text: Scholarship for girl students pursuing degree level technical education in AICTE approved institutions. Maximum two girl children per family are eligible. Family income should not exceed ₹8 lakh per annum.

scheme_name: AICTE-Pragati Scholarship Scheme for Girl Students (Diploma)
description_text: Scholarship for girl students pursuing diploma in AICTE-approved institutions. Empowering women through technical education.

scheme_name: AICTE - SAKSHAM SCHOLARSHIP SCHEME FOR SPECIALLY-ABLED STUDENT (DEGREE)
description_text: Saksham is a MHRD Scheme being implemented by AICTE aimed at providing encouragement and support to specially-abled children to pursue technical education. The candidate should be admitted to First year of Degree level course OR Second year of Degree level course through lateral entry in any of the AICTE approved Institution. Family income from all sources should not be more than Rs. 8 lakh per annum.

scheme_name: AICTE – SWANATH SCHOLARSHIP SCHEME FOR STUDENTS
administering_body: All India Council for Technical Education
description_text: The Scheme is being implemented by AICTE to provide encouragement and support to orphans, wards of parents died due to Covid-19, wards of Armed Forces and Central Paramilitary Forces martyred in action to pursue education in AICTE Approved institutions and courses.

scheme_name: Central Sector Scheme of Top Class Education in College for OBC, EBC and DNT Students
administering_body: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
award_amount: Full tuition fee, ₹3000/month, ₹5000/year for books and stationery, ₹45000 one-time for computer/laptop
description_text: The scheme provides financial support to OBC, EBC, and DNT students pursuing higher education in notified institutions. The scholarship covers tuition fee, living expenses, and other expenses. The scheme is administered by the Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment.

scheme_name: Central Sector Scheme of Scholarship for College and University Students
administering_body: Ministry of Education, Government of India
description_text: Financial assistance to meritorious students from poor families pursuing higher studies. Awarded based on Higher Secondary/ Class XII Board Examination results. 50% earmarked for girls.

scheme_name: Pre-Matric Scholarship for Students with Disabilities
administering_body: Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities
description_text: Scholarship for students with benchmark disabilities studying in classes IX or X in government or recognized schools.

scheme_name: Post-Matric Scholarship for Students with Disabilities
administering_body: Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities
description_text: Scholarship for students with benchmark disabilities pursuing post-matriculation or post-secondary courses upto Master degree level in recognized institutions.

scheme_name: Top Class Education Scholarship for Students with Disabilities
administering_body: Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities
description_text: Scholarship for students with benchmark disabilities pursuing graduate and post-graduate degree/diploma in notified institutes of excellence in education.

scheme_name: National Overseas Scholarship for Students with Disabilities
administering_body: Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities
description_text: Scholarship for students with benchmark disabilities pursuing Master's degree or Ph.D. in foreign universities/institutes.

scheme_name: National Fellowship for Persons with Disabilities
administering_body: Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities
description_text: Fellowship for persons with benchmark disabilities pursuing M.Phil. or Ph.D. in Indian universities.

scheme_name: Free Coaching Scholarship for Students with Disabilities
administering_body: Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities
description_text: Free coaching for students with benchmark disabilities for competitive examinations for government jobs and entrance examinations for professional and technical courses.

scheme_name: Ishan Uday Special Scholarship Scheme for North Eastern Region
description_text: Scholarships for students from North Eastern Region pursuing undergraduate degree programmes in recognized institutions. Selection is based on merit in Class XII examination. Income of parents should be below ₹4.50 lakh per annum.

scheme_name: National Scholarship for Postgraduate Studies
description_text: Scholarship for postgraduate studies in India, awarded to 10,000 students annually, with 30% reservation for women candidates.

scheme_name: National Talent Scholarship
description_text: Scholarship for students pursuing Bachelor or Master degree in Agricultural University outside their state of domicile. Awarded based on merit through All India Entrance Examination.

scheme_name: Financial Assistance for Education to the Wards of Beedi Workers
description_text: Financial assistance for education to the wards of Beedi workers is given to students whose parents are Beedi workers with at least six months service. The benefits are transferred through DBT system and applications are processed through National Scholarship Portal.

scheme_name: Financial Assistance for Education to the Wards of Iron Ore, Manganese Ore & Chrome Ore Mine Workers
description_text: Financial assistance for education to the wards of Iron Ore, Manganese Ore & Chrome Ore Mine workers is given to students whose parents are Mine workers with at least six months service. The benefits are transferred through DBT system and applications are processed through National Scholarship Portal.

scheme_name: Financial Assistance for Education to the Wards of Limestone & Dolomite Mine Workers
description_text: Financial assistance for education to the wards of Limestone & Dolomite Mine workers is given to students whose parents are Mine workers with at least six months service. The benefits are transferred through DBT system and applications are processed through National Scholarship Portal.

scheme_name: Financial Assistance for Education to the Wards of Cine Workers
description_text: Financial assistance for education to the wards of Cine workers is given to students whose parents are Cine workers with at least six months service. The benefits are transferred through DBT system and applications are processed through National Scholarship Portal.

scheme_name: Prime Minister's Scholarship Scheme for RPF/RPSF
description_text: Scholarship for wards of RPF/RPSF personnel for professional degree courses like BE, B.Tech, MBBS etc.

scheme_name: NEC Merit Scholarship
description_text: Financial support to students of North East Region for higher professional courses

scheme_name: Pre-Matric Scholarship Scheme
description_text: Scholarship for minority students studying in Classes 1-10. Scholarship amount varies by class and course type. Applications invited annually.

scheme_name: Post-Matric Scholarship Scheme
description_text: Scholarship for minority students pursuing post-matriculation education. Amount varies by course type and level. Annual applications invited.

scheme_name: Merit-cum-Means Scholarship Scheme
description_text: Scholarship for minority students pursuing professional courses. Family income should be below ₹2.5 lakh. Merit-based selection.

scheme_name: Special Scholarship Scheme for Students of Union Territories of Jammu & Kashmir and Ladakh
administering_body: Ministry of Education, Government of India
award_amount: Tuition fee and maintenance allowance (up to ₹1.25 Lakh for Professional/Engineering, ₹30,000 for General, ₹3.00 Lakh for Medical) + ₹1.00 Lakh maintenance allowance per annum
description_text: Scholarships for students from Jammu & Kashmir and Ladakh to pursue higher education outside UTs. Covers tuition fee and maintenance allowance.

scheme_name: ICAR Junior Research Fellowship for Post Graduate Studies
description_text: ICAR-JRF (PGS) is awarded for post-graduate study leading to a Master's degree in Agricultural Sciences

scheme_name: ICAR Senior Research Fellowship for Post Graduate Studies
description_text: ICAR-SRF (PGS) is awarded for post-graduate study leading to a Ph.D. degree in Agricultural Sciences

scheme_name: Indian Statistical Institute Stipend Scheme
description_text: Stipend is awarded to students at the time of admission and continued based on academic performance, conduct, and attendance.

scheme_name: Indian Statistical Institute Contingency Grant
description_text: Contingency grant is provided to students to support their academic and research expenses.

scheme_name: Indian Statistical Institute Prize Money
description_text: Prize money is awarded to students for outstanding performances in examinations.

scheme_name: Scheme of Top Class Scholarship for SC Students
administering_body: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
award_amount: Full tuition fee, non-refundable charges, ₹86000 (1st year), ₹41000 (subsequent years)
description_text: The Scheme aims at recognizing and promoting quality education amongst students belonging to SCs, by providing financial support to pursue studies beyond 12th class in notified institutions.

scheme_name: National Scholarship Scheme for ST Students
award_amount: Full tuition fee, ₹5000/year for books, ₹3000/month stipend, ₹45000 one-time for computer
description_text: Scholarship for ST students pursuing graduate and post-graduate courses in premier institutes identified by Ministry of Tribal Affairs

scheme_name: National Fellowship for ST Students
description_text: Fellowship for ST students pursuing higher education
